c.d: The number of active users on the platform, influencing exposure and potential buyers
Costs associated with listing and selling items, including commissions and processing fees
User interface design and simplicity for creating listings and managing sales
Availability and flexibility of shipping methods including prepaid labels and local pickup
Variety of product types that can be sold on the platform (e.g., clothes, electronics, furniture)
Whether the app is mainly focused on local buyers or supports nationwide/international sales
Verification systems and measures to ensure safe transactions
Average app store ratings reflecting user satisfaction and app reliability
